title: Ramblin' Man
why_this_song: Ramblin' Man by Allman Brothers Band (1973) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Lord, I was born a ramblin' man
Tryin' to make a livin' and doin' the best I can
And when it's time for leavin', I hope you'll understand
That I was born a ramblin' man
Lord, I was born a ramblin' man
Lord, I was born a ramblin' man
Lord, I was born a ramblin' man
Lord, I was born a ramblin' man

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "born" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "born" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ramblin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ramblin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Ramblin' Man" was released in 1973. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Ramblin' Man" foi lançada em 1973. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Ramblin' Man" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Ramblin' Man" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Ramblin' Man" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Ramblin' Man" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Ramblin' Man" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Ramblin' Man"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Ramblin' Man", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Ramblin' Man", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Allman Brothers Band one question about "Ramblin' Man", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Allman Brothers Band sobre "Ramblin' Man", o que seria e por quê?
